summary: Iteration 28: Frontend-only testing of P2 fixes - Sizing Math Help panel, nested button fix in TokenCalculatorSummary, sidebar collapsible sections. All 4 requested features verified working correctly.

console_errors.issue: Switch component nested inside AccordionTrigger causes 'button cannot be descendant of button' console error
console_errors.note: Not part of P2 scope - separate issue

console_errors.issue: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop warning

Sizing Math Help - Step 2: Workload formulas (QPS, LPS calculations)

Sidebar CUSTOMERS section - collapsible and visible

Sidebar TARGET SOLUTIONS section - collapsible with DC/Sites count
Sidebar navigation - Discovery tab switches content correctly
